list.title: 修改跟单接口

req_query.name: buyType
req_query.desc: 跟买类型 MAXIMUM(1,"最大跟买"),FIXED(2, "固定跟买")

req_query.name: sellType
req_query.desc: 卖出方式 NONE(1, "不跟卖"), AUTO(2, "自动跟卖")

req_query.name: maxVolume
req_query.desc: 单个钱包跟单最大投资额
